content: Reaction time is heavily influenced by sleep and dopamine levels. Studies show that aerobic exercise can improve RT by up to 10% immediately post-workout.
Spatial memory relies on the hippocampus. The 'Method of Loci' is the most effective training technique. Chronic stress damages the hippocampus and reduces memory span.
The Stroop test measures executive control in the prefrontal cortex. Meditation (Mindfulness) increases gray matter density in this area, improving inhibition scores.
